task_description: Add Amazon Bedrock as an additional LLM extraction endpoint type alongside the existing Ollama endpoint, using the Python SDK (boto3) to access Bedrock.

verification.summary: 437 tests pass (1 deselected is pre-existing failure). 26 new bedrock tests cover config parsing, service initialization, mocked _call_bedrock with valid/invalid responses, think-block stripping, markdown fence extraction, prompt verification, sidecar file writing, and invalid JSON handling. Two review passes completed with all critical issues resolved.
